description_long: This is an electric guitar with a double-cutaway body design, featuring a glossy black finish with a contrasting wood grain pickguard and control area. The body is contoured and has a modern, ergonomic shape, with chrome hardware including a bridge, pickups, and control knobs. The neck is long and slender, with a rosewood or similar dark fingerboard and metallic frets, leading up to a headstock with six tuning pegs arranged in a single row. The headstock is angled and features a black finish with a visible logo or text. The guitar has three visible pickups and a set of control knobs and switches for tone and volume adjustment. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban music scenes or street performances.
description: A sleek, double-cutaway electric guitar with a glossy black body, wood grain pickguard, chrome hardware, and a modern headstock.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the black body, wood grain pickguard, chrome pickups, and full neck with headstock.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's thin body, long neck, and the raised hardware components.
description_view_2: Rear angled view focusing on the back of the body and neck, with the headstock and tuning pegs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the body contour, neck, and the arrangement of the pickups and controls.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs and a visible logo or text
